📖 Dashboard Guide
SSE UAR — Evidence Collection Dashboard

🎯 Two-Tab Workflow

TabWho it's forAction
✅ Can CloseAPMs with AD groups verified in MARDownload CSV → upload to AuditBoard → check Done
❌ Issue / Needs WorkAPMs with no MAR matchIssue UAR finding or follow up with owner

📥 Evidence Collection Steps

  1. Filter to ✅ Can Close tab — these APMs have MAR evidence ready
  2. Click 📥 CSV to download the MAR evidence file
  3. Click 🔗 AB to open the finding in AuditBoard
  4. Upload the CSV as evidence attachment in AuditBoard
  5. Check ✅ Done — the row moves to the "Collected" sub-tab

🧠 AI Fields

FieldMeaning
SLACompliant = within deadline. Non-Compliant = past due SLA.
SentimentTone of comment history: Positive 😊 / Neutral 😐 / Negative 😠
Last Reach OutWho sent the last comment — Customer (app team) or SSE (our team)
SSE ReviewerSSE team member assigned to this finding

SSE UAR · Data from BigQuery uar_findings_enriched · MAR quarterly evidence
Questions? Reach out to SSE Global Compliance.
